name: legal ops teams in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For legal ops teams in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient contract management causes missed renewals. We automate renewal notifications instead of manual tracking of contract dates and compliance requirements.
target_audience: legal ops teams in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month
problem_solved: inefficient contract management leading to missed renewals

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient contract management leading to missed renewals

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates and compliance requirements
